name: hindsight
description: Durable time-aware memory for ZCode via Hindsight. Exposes hindsight_search (recall), hindsight_context (reflect), and hindsight_retain tools that reuse the SAME hindsight banks as the pi agent. Shares ~/.hindsight/config.json and resolves identical bank IDs.

enabled.description: Master enable. If false the MCP server refuses calls. Usually controlled by ~/.hindsight/config.json instead.

base_url.description: Override the Hindsight server URL. Empty = use ~/.hindsight/config.json (recommended so pi and zcode agree).

api_key.description: Override the Hindsight API key. Empty = use ~/.hindsight/config.json.

bank_id.description: Force a single bank ID for every project. Empty = derive per-repo (same as pi).

global_bank_id.description: Optional global/cross-project bank ID, surfaced alongside the per-project bank.

bank_strategy.description: Bank derivation strategy: per-repo (default), per-directory, git-branch, global, pi-session, manual. Empty = use config file.

search_budget.description: Default recall budget: low | mid | high. Empty = mid (or config file).

reflect_budget.description: Default reflect budget: low | mid | high. Empty = low (or config file).
